symptoms.symptom_name: Widespread urticaria/hives after mammalian meat ingestion

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Typical skin features are one limb of the anaphylaxis criteria and point to an IgE-mediated food reaction.
Urticaria is not a feature of infectious gastroenteritis.

symptoms.symptom_name: Severe generalised abdominal cramping with nausea

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Persistent severe GI symptoms are an accepted limb of the anaphylaxis criteria, especially prominent in alpha-gal reactions.

symptoms.symptom_name: Presyncope / light-headedness on standing with palpitations

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Circulatory involvement (postural dizziness, tachycardia) confirms systemic anaphylaxis and mandates adrenaline.
Circulatory compromise excludes an isolated cutaneous reaction.
Malaise/fatigue accompanies systemic mediator release but is non-specific; here it co-occurs with circulatory involvement.

symptoms.symptom_name: Delayed onset 4-5 hours after mammalian (red) meat, with outdoor/tick exposure

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A delayed (2-6 hour) reaction to mammalian meat with a tick-exposure history is the characteristic pattern of alpha-gal syndrome.

symptoms.symptom_name: No throat tightness / airway patent (pertinent negative)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of airway involvement does not exclude anaphylaxis when circulatory and GI limbs are involved; it must not falsely reassure.

symptoms.symptom_name: Tachycardia HR 112 bpm and relative hypotension BP 105/65 mmHg (clinician-measured)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Objective compensated circulatory involvement — sealed clinician measurement. In telehealth the AI Doctor infers circulatory compromise from the postural presyncope, not from a measured BP.
Elevated alpha-gal specific IgE confirms the mechanism retrospectively — an outpatient serology test, never available in real time in telehealth.

symptom_clusters.cluster_name: Multi-system anaphylaxis constellation after mammalian meat
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Typical skin features + persistent severe GI + circulatory involvement together satisfy anaphylaxis criteria and mandate adrenaline plus emergency escalation.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Serum mast-cell tryptase (acute, drawn 1-2 hours from onset)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Supports mast-cell activation / anaphylaxis retrospectively; a hospital investigation obtained during emergency care, not available in telehealth.
Confirms the alpha-gal mechanism after recovery; an outpatient allergy work-up ordered by the GP/allergist, not part of acute management.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Abdominal imaging / CT for the abdominal pain
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: The abdominal cramping is explained by the systemic allergic reaction; imaging is not indicated acutely and would delay recognition and treatment of anaphylaxis.
